case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. OSCAR CAMPOS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GLENN E. GUTSCHE IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-13-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-03-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-15-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, OSCAR DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-03-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-06-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-19-2010
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-03-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED AUG-25-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPOS, OSCAR
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-08-2010. OCT-13-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 HOURS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPOS, OSCAR
DECLARATION OF GLENN E. GUTSCHE IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON AUG-03-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR DENNIS PERRY ISAAC APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-08-2010 THROUGH FEB-06-2011.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-15-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND POS FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPOS, OSCAR
